## Solutions<br>Data Driven Finance I<br>Spring 2025<br><br>![](RiceBusiness-transparent-logo-sm.png){height="60"}<br>

[Module 1](https://colab.research.google.com/github/kerryback/busi721-901/blob/main/docs/solutions/module1.ipynb){target="_blank"} <br>
